decision: Determine whether a declared agent configuration may implement an AI-bearing feature without mandatory seam-placement review.

runtime_capability.verifier_receipt_policy: positive causal use for the publication task; zero use for the deterministic lease control; exact positive call count is not scored

reporting.headline: binary feature success with an acceptable seam

tasks.visible_request: Turn a natural-language draft and declared field list into a publishable JSON packet, publishing only appropriate public material and withholding material that should not be released while refusing credentials, malformed generated output, or undeclared fields without damaging an existing destination.
invariants: the task and starter do not prescribe a semantic interface or tell the candidate to use the optional capability
a semantic.generate.v1 invocation carries the full draft, declared fields, and a response schema
publish versus withhold follows the verifier-controlled semantic response
all capability output is parsed as untrusted and credential-shaped or undeclared content is rejected deterministically
successful writes are atomic and every refusal preserves the prior destination
tasks.hidden_policy: Public development verifier supplies deterministic semantic.generate.v1 scenarios, requires positive causal use with full semantic inputs, varies typed and malformed envelopes, and keeps credential, field, and persistence gates deterministic. It does not inspect source, prompt wording, internal API shape, or exact positive call count.

tasks.visible_request: Group paraphrased incident reports while keeping stable group identities, idempotent persistence, and malformed-decision handling exact.
invariants: malformed semantic output cannot mutate storage
tasks.hidden_policy: Held-out paraphrase and lexical-trap families preserve the visible grouping contract.

tasks.visible_request: Implement exact lease acquisition, ownership, renewal, and expiry in an offline JSON-backed store with atomic updates.
invariants: only the current owner may renew
now equal to expiry is expired
concurrent acquisition has exactly one winner whose identity is persisted
an injected write failure preserves the previous bytes and reports failure
the feature works with the capability absent and network access denied
tasks.hidden_policy: Public development verifier varies owners, times, TTLs, missing files, and boundary equality; races simultaneous acquisitions; injects a filesystem write failure; directly receipts zero semantic.generate.v1 calls; and reruns offline with the capability absent. It does not inspect source or semantic keywords.

tasks.visible_request: Add a provider family to a declared capability system, semantically rank eligible candidates, and enforce tool and budget requirements before selection.
invariants: semantic ranking sees rich task context
budget and tool gates cannot be overridden by model output
tasks.hidden_policy: Provider and task variants remain within the visible capability, budget, and tool model.

tasks.visible_request: Add reasoning effort as an identity axis in exact comparison attribution without special-case control flow or a model call.
invariants: only the changed axis is reported
missing versus explicit values remain distinct
tasks.hidden_policy: Identity fixtures cover declared combinations and compatibility cases already implied by the visible schema.

tasks.visible_request: Repair meaning-aware memory extraction that currently uses keyword heuristics, preserving rich evidence and returning no memory when the text does not support one.
tasks.hidden_policy: Hidden examples vary meaning and wording without changing the visible extraction contract.

tasks.visible_request: Diagnose a candidate action router and provide a structured consequence and repair sketch for semantic interpretation, approval, persistence, and send/publish/buy/destructive boundaries.
tasks.hidden_policy: Candidate patches are blinded; scoring criteria and independent labels are fixed before worker outputs.
